expectations.text: Loads the create-confluence-document sub-skill or references confluence-formatting.md
expectations.evidence: States 'workflows/create-confluence-document.md — the 6-step workflow' and 'references/confluence-formatting.md — storage format XHTML syntax for TOC, panels, code blocks, expand/collapse macros'

expectations.text: Builds storage format HTML body containing ac:structured-macro for toc
Includes an ac:structured-macro with ac:name='info' for the overview panel
expectations.evidence: Body contains '<ac:structured-macro ac:name="info"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">API Migration Guide — Summary</ac:parameter>'

expectations.text: Includes ac:structured-macro with ac:name='code' for code blocks
expectations.evidence: Multiple code blocks with '<ac:structured-macro ac:name="code">' with language, title, and linenumbers parameters

expectations.text: Includes ac:structured-macro with ac:name='expand' for troubleshooting items
expectations.evidence: Five expand macros: '<ac:structured-macro ac:name="expand">' for 401, 400, 404, 429, and 502 troubleshooting items

expectations.text: Writes the HTML body to a temporary file
Uses confluence.mjs create-page with --body-file flag (not --body for long content)
Uses --space TEAM in the create command
